name: Fazri Gading
heroBadge: Open for Work, Collaborations, and Research
heroTagline: Architecting vision-centric intelligence to bridge the gap between academic theory and agricultural impact.

about.title: Pioneering Computer Vision for a Sustainable Future.
about.intro: As an AI Engineer, my core passion lies at the intersection of **Computer Vision** and **Agriculture**. I believe that advanced neural networks can solve some of the most critical challenges in resource estimation and crop health.
about.detailed: My work is deeply rooted in practical application. I've developed specialized vision systems for **detecting Ganoderma fungus** in oil palm trees—a critical threat to palm health—and implemented robust algorithms for **counting oil palm fruit bunches** to optimize yield estimation.

highlights.title: Yield Estimation
highlights.desc: Reliable AI-driven data extraction for smart farming.

highlights.title: Vision Systems
highlights.desc: Real-time object detection and segmentation at scale.

highlights.title: Research & Development
highlights.desc: Bridging academic insights with practical solutions.

highlights.title: Collaboration
highlights.desc: Open to partnerships that drive agricultural innovation.

footer.tagline: Engineering intelligence to solve agricultural challenges through code and vision.
